name: Star Comgistic Capital Co., Ltd.
summary: Star Comgistic Capital Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells household appliances in Taiwan and internationally. It offers green energy products; grills, including table top grills, Panini makers, baking centers, hot pots, steak grills, multi cookers, foldable griddles, and healthy grills; food preparation products, such as blenders, mixers, food processors, and juice extractors; and home comfort products comprising dehumudifiers, heaters, fans, and vacuum cleaners. The company also provides outdoor grills; microwave and oven products; beverage products consisting of pump espresso makers, coffee makers, kettles, steam mixers, and automatic espresso makers; and garment care products, including steam irons, boil station irons, garment steamers, and LCD electronic irons, as well as frying pans and skip toasters. In addition, it designs and manufactures molds, feed and process non-ferrous metal composite materials, and new alloy materials; sells raw materials, molds, machinery equipment, and components, as well as semi-finished products; and is involved in the import, export, and wholesale of various small household electrical appliances. The company was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
